case_title: LYDIA YAFFE VS. THE FILLMORE CENTER

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YAFFE, LYDIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $551.00 FILED BY YAFFE, LYDIA AS TO DEFENDANT THE FILLMORE CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00<WAIVED>) SERVED NOV-09-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THE FILLMORE CENTER
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE FILLMORE CENTER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-08-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-08-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF LYDIA YAFFE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE FILLMORE CENTER REPRESENTED BY STEPHANIE YURKANIN AND BRANDON BIRCH ARE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2024 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY YAFFE, LYDIA THE FILLMORE CENTER
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YAFFE, LYDIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE FILLMORE CENTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
